---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `inksight ...`
2. ...

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- InkSight version: (`inksight --version`)
- Node.js version: (`node --version`)
- OS: (e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04)
- reMarkable model: (e.g. Paper Pro, reMarkable 2)
- Connection method: Cloud / SSH / USB

## Additional context

Log output, screenshots, or anything else that might help.
